creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Today, I ran on two other CURRENT systems into the very same problem, amongst another port complaining about an object_elf() issue.

This very specific problem occurs obviously (in my cases) on systems which I have buildworld with option -DNO_CLEAN - which is a kind of default now, as I understood the last reports on how the build-tree is handled on most recent CURRENT.

By deleting the /usr/obj folder and buildworld from scratch I can avoid and resolve that error on all systems in question.
